MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Progress Report On The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account For The Minor, Karla Magallanes
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Nov-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, Karla Magallanes.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ashwin Ladva, Esq. appeared with petitioner John Magallanes, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Karla Magallanes, who was also present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Mr. Magallanes Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on July 12, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $100,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $25,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $8,344.00.
Costs - $5,920.00.

The net balance of $60,736.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 4648 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112. Telephone: 415-396-3091. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action for the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Continued To Oct-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220, email: robertbalian.csr@gmail.com
